transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Willowbrook Care Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Feldman.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can you give me your name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see your appointment is this Thursday at 2 PM. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we push it to next Tuesday, maybe in the morning?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, I have an opening next Tuesday at 9:30 AM with Dr. Feldman. Does that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, you're all set for Tuesday at 9:30 AM. You'll get a text confirmation shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Marcus. Have a great day.
